form.formComment: Returns from a 43-day let-up. Last start ran last of 9 at this track on February 22 over 2000m, on heavy track; 27 len behind Total Magic carrying 57kg at $8.10. The race before that 2nd of 8 at this track on January 4 over 1300m, in the wet; 6 len behind Sandbank with 58kg at $3.90. Needs to find extra to beat these.

form.formComment: Freshened since claiming her maiden victory on debut; won by 2.75 len at this track February 9 over 1300m defeating La Segretaria with 56kg at $4.60. Can keep the momentum up.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign second last of 8 at this track on January 5 over 1400m, on heavy track; 16 len behind Just Jump carrying 55kg at $2.90.
